name: Project Management
description: Root entity gating all features. Supports MDOT and LOCAL_AGENCY modes with project-scoped data isolation
current_phase: S592: ~30 missing testing keys identified for project UI. E2E verification spec covers T01-T06 (foundation), T14-T20 (mutations), T28-T31 (roles). Needs /implement.
constraints_summary: Root entity: all features scoped to project via project_id
No creating entries/photos/contractors/locations without parent project
Project mode (MDOT or LOCAL_AGENCY) set at creation, immutable
No feature queries spanning multiple projects
Orphaned projects (zero children, created_at=updated_at, >30min old) cleaned via two-pass deletion on startup
